kept_spans: I finally found some super fire baggy brown jorts.
Thank god these are fully cotton.
And they have this asymmetrical stitching that looks super unique.
But you're probably thinking these are hard to style, so let me show you how to make an easy outfit.
I specifically wanted the brown shorts so I could match it with a yellow shirt.
So we got FA on the tee, breakfast on the belt, and last resorts on the feet.
And honestly, I would definitely go to the skate park in this outfit.
And I love that these shorts have deep pockets, you can keep your phone in them and not worry about it falling out at all.

Not only did these ship in less than three days, but they are on a massive spring summer sale as well. So if you're seeing this video, they're still in stock, but sizes are super limited, and I do not know if they'll be restocking.
But I will be giving updates if that happens, and as well, check out my page for a ton more gas fashion finds.
